requirement_topic.en: Fire-Safety Review for Stationary Lithium BESS Installations
requirement_topic.zh: 固定式锂电BESS安装消防安全审查
requirement_topic.zht: 固定式鋰電BESS安裝消防安全審查

summary.en: The official public material reviewed did not identify one Tunisia BESS-only fire certificate. Fire safety should therefore be handled as an installation and project-permit issue involving the local authority having jurisdiction, site owner, insurer, EPC, and emergency responders. A BESS fire package should cover layout, separation, container rating, ventilation, gas detection where relevant, thermal-runaway mitigation, emergency shutdown, firefighting access, water or agent strategy, signage, and emergency procedures in the required local language.
summary.zh: 已审阅的官方公开材料未识别到单一的突尼斯BESS专用消防证书。因此，消防安全应作为安装和项目许可问题处理，涉及当地主管机关、场址业主、保险方、EPC和应急响应方。BESS消防资料包应覆盖布置、间距、集装箱等级、通风、适用时的气体探测、热失控缓解、紧急停机、消防通道、用水或灭火剂策略、标识及所需当地语言应急程序。
summary.zht: 已審閱的官方公開材料未識別到單一的突尼西亞BESS專用消防證書。因此，消防安全應作為安裝和項目許可問題處理，涉及當地主管機關、場址業主、保險方、EPC和應急響應方。BESS消防資料包應覆蓋布置、間距、集裝箱等級、通風、適用時的氣體探測、熱失控緩解、緊急停機、消防通道、用水或滅火劑策略、標識及所需當地語言應急程序。

standards_or_laws: Tunisia local fire-authority and building-permit review where applicable
IEC 62933 safety evidence where called up by tender, owner, insurer, or authority

summary.en: China BESS files may include GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB/T 36558-2023, container fire-system specifications, and Chinese project fire-review evidence. These can support Tunisia due diligence but do not replace a Tunisia site fire review.
summary.zh: 中国BESS文件可能包括GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023、集装箱消防系统规格和中国项目消防审查证据。这些文件可支持突尼斯尽调，但不能替代突尼斯现场消防审查。
summary.zht: 中國BESS文件可能包括GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023、集裝箱消防系統規格和中國項目消防審查證據。這些文件可支持突尼西亞盡調，但不能替代突尼西亞現場消防審查。

gap.en: Provide Tunisia site drawings, hazard analysis, battery chemistry and thermal-runaway data, fire detection and suppression design, HVAC and ventilation evidence, emergency shutdown logic, emergency response plan, and commissioning records for review by the authority, owner, EPC, and insurer.
gap.zh: 应提供突尼斯场址图纸、危险分析、电池化学体系和热失控数据、火灾探测和灭火设计、HVAC和通风证据、紧急停机逻辑、应急响应计划及调试记录，供主管机关、业主、EPC和保险方审查。
gap.zht: 應提供突尼西亞場址圖紙、危險分析、電池化學體系和熱失控數據、火災探測和滅火設計、HVAC和通風證據、緊急停機邏輯、應急響應計劃及調試記錄，供主管機關、業主、EPC和保險方審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where local fire, building, site-permit, owner, insurer, lender, EPC, or tender review applies; no single public Tunisia BESS-only fire certificate was identified in the reviewed official sources
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, local fire review, and contract requirements

source.publisher: Office National de la Protection Civile (Tunisia)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A battery or IEC report alone is not a Tunisia fire approval. Build a site-specific fire-safety package for the local authority, owner, EPC, and insurer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 电池或IEC报告本身不是突尼斯消防批准。应为当地主管机关、业主、EPC和保险方准备场址特定消防安全资料包。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 電池或IEC報告本身不是突尼西亞消防批准。應為當地主管機關、業主、EPC和保險方準備場址特定消防安全資料包。
